title: epipactis latifolia var. vulgaris
intro: Epipactis latifolia var. vulgaris, also known as the broad-leaved helleborine, is a variety of orchid native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Epipactis latifolia var. vulgaris are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
